title: lobularia maritima
intro: Lobularia maritima, also known as sweet marjoram or sweet stock, is a flowering annual plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its delicate white or pale pink flowers and sweet fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Lobularia maritima is rich in antioxidants, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lobularia maritima can be found in teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate stress, promote relaxation, and soothe respiratory issues.
